reforms.description: The Parliament decides to spend SF2.1 billion for university research between 1992 and 1995, aiming to enhance the research capacity of Swiss universities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for university research is expected to enhance innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The Parliament has approved the funding allocation for university research.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in the research capacity of universities, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The Parliament decides to spend SF2.1 billion for university research between 1992 and 1995.
